codeReview.summary: The fix closes the exact Web issues-board inconsistency called out in the prior failed review. `ui/src/components/IssuesList.tsx` now routes status filtering, status sorting, and status grouping through `getIssueDisplayStatus(...)` (`getIssueListStatus` at lines 97-128 and 325), so a stale-recovered issue with raw `status: "in_progress"` and projected/display `todo` no longer remains in active list buckets. The added focused regressions in `ui/src/components/IssuesList.test.tsx` cover the recovered grouping, filtering, and sorting cases that were previously missing. I did not find any new blocking issues in scope for this fix review.

summary: Review passed: I checked the mission/repo guidance, the prior failed review, both relevant diffs, both handoffs, the fix transcript skeleton, and the `web-runtime-worker`/`audit-worker` skills. Commit `2a0ea8f325c18f9145b5e83d19e26c6f54fbc2e4` resolves the original blocking `IssuesList` raw-status bug by using projected/display status for list filtering, sorting, and status grouping, and I did not find any new blocking issues in scope.
